---
name: Task
about: Create a project task
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task
assignees: ""
---

## Objective
What needs to be done?

## Background
Why does this task matter?

## Inputs
What files, notebooks, data, or dependencies are needed?

## Expected output
What should exist when this task is complete?

## Owner
Who is responsible?

## Dependencies
What must be completed first?

## Definition of done
- [ ] code runs
- [ ] output saved in standard format
- [ ] docs updated if needed
- [ ] reviewed by supervisor
